description: A low pressure chemical vapor deposition (LPCVD) system for depositing polysilicon films from silane (SiH4) gas at controlled temperatures and pressures.

components.name: process_tube
components.role: contains wafers during deposition process and provides controlled atmosphere
components.evidence: horizontal tube furnace with wafer boat positioning system

components.name: heating_zones
components.role: provides controlled temperature profile across the process tube
components.evidence: Zone1 610.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min Zone2 610.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min Zone3 610.0 °C Slope 10.00 °C/min

components.name: boat_loader
components.role: moves wafer boat in and out of process tube
components.evidence: Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min with oscillation speed of 0.0 mm/min

components.name: vacuum_pump
components.role: evacuates process tube and maintains low pressure environment
components.evidence: MAINVAC[16] = ON and EVACUATE steps in process recipe

components.name: gas_delivery_system
components.role: supplies and controls process gases including N2 and SiH4
components.evidence: Gas N2 [1] at 10.0 [slm] and Gas SIH4DOOR [2] at 60.0 [sccm]

components.name: pressure_control_valve
components.role: maintains process pressure at setpoint during deposition

components.name: mass_flow_controllers
components.role: precisely control gas flow rates for process gases
components.evidence: Mass Flow Controller example shows Electronics and Control valve components

components.name: exhaust_system
components.role: removes process gases and maintains vacuum
components.evidence: exhaust to burn chamber and To pump connections shown

components.name: temperature_controllers
components.role: control heating zone temperatures and temperature ramping

components.name: process_controller
components.role: coordinates overall process sequence and safety interlocks
components.evidence: Digital out N2 PURGE[9] = ON,N2PROCES[10] = ON,PROCESS[11] = ON

flow_paths.evidence: Gas SIH4DOOR [2] at 60.0 [sccm] and Gas SIH4REAR [3] at 60.0 [sccm]

operation_sequence.description: Load wafers onto boat and position boat outside tube
operation_sequence.evidence: BOAT OUT - Boat to 10.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min

operation_sequence.description: Insert boat with wafers into process tube
operation_sequence.evidence: BOAT IN - Boat to 2000.0 mm at 300.0 mm/min

operation_sequence.description: Evacuate process tube to remove air and moisture
operation_sequence.evidence: EVAC 1, EVAC 2, EVAC 3 steps with MAINVAC[16] = ON

operation_sequence.description: Heat process tube to deposition temperature
Establish process gas flows and pressure
operation_sequence.evidence: SET GASFLOWS and SET PRESSURE steps with SIH4 flows and 250.0 mtor pressure

operation_sequence.description: Perform polysilicon deposition for specified time
Stop gas flows and evacuate tube
operation_sequence.evidence: EVACUATE step after deposition with gas flows set to 0.0
BACKFILL steps and boat removal sequence

assumptions.statement: The system operates at 610°C for polysilicon deposition
assumptions.reason: Temperature setpoints are consistently shown as 610.0°C across all heating zones but the specific material being deposited is inferred from the SiH4 gas usage

assumptions.statement: The boat position of 2000.0 mm represents full insertion into the tube
assumptions.reason: This position is used during processing steps but the physical tube length is not explicitly stated
SiH4 gas at 610°C temperature is typical for polysilicon deposition but the specific film type is not explicitly stated in the process steps
